completed: Captured mission.
Initialized local MDE artifacts.
Created public GitHub repository.
Implemented Cloudflare Worker-compatible Cranfield search and explain endpoints.
Added OpenSearch index mapping and sample bulk indexing artifact.
Added baseline evaluation metrics and fixture evaluation artifact.
Recorded ADL-001 for the OpenSearch BM25 baseline.
Implemented full public Cranfield export and OpenSearch bulk payload generation.
Documented AWS OpenSearch Service managed-cluster provider setup and credential split.
Verified Cloudflare token/account/Workers read access without exposing secret values.
Created ignored .env.local from the provided OpenSearch ServiceURL without printing secrets.
Verified live OpenSearch health.
Created and loaded cranfield-v0 with 1,400 public Cranfield documents.
Ran live Cranfield evaluation over 225 queries.
Uploaded Cloudflare Worker OpenSearch runtime secrets without printing values.
Deployed the retail-search Cloudflare Worker.
Verified public health, search, explain, latest, and versioned endpoint aliases.
Added and deployed a public root search interface.
Added indexed-data guidance and metadata endpoints for Cranfield.
Verified the public interface, metadata, search, and explain endpoints twice.
Added and deployed a Search Explain retrieval flow diagram.
Verified the public flow diagram and explain retrievalFlow response twice.
Added and deployed public evaluation results with aggregate metrics plus strong, mixed, and weak query examples.
Verified the evaluation UI and evaluation JSON endpoints twice.
Reorganized the public interface into a home page that lists all phases and focused Phase 1 subsection pages for overview, search, data, explain, and evaluation.
Deployed and verified the organized public routes, aliases, search API, explain API, and evaluation API.
Added public dataset references for Cranfield, BEIR, and Amazon ESCI, plus an explicit no-source-yet note for the future behavior phase.
Deployed and verified the dataset references on the public home, Phase 1 data/overview, planned phase pages, metadata API, and search API.
Integrated the project traceability and versioning mission update into MISSION.md.
Added the Phase 1 traceability chain M-0001 -> A-0002 -> SE-0001 -> ARCH-0.1 -> ADL-0001 -> v0.1.0.
Added local /api/v0.1/search and /api/v0.1/explain aliases plus traceability payloads in API responses.
Added a traceability validator to npm run validate.
Added Cranfield failure behavior grouping for live evaluation artifacts.
Ran live baseline, query-rescue, and field-sum evaluations over 225 Cranfield queries.
Rejected query-rescue because it regressed all core metrics.
Kept field-sum as ARCH-0.2-candidate after improving all core Cranfield metrics.
Added SE-0002, ADL-0002, ARCH-0.2-candidate, and evaluation comparison evidence.
Drilled into baseline zero-relevant-at-10 failures and found 19 of 28 had relevant documents between ranks 11 and 50.
Added opt-in coverage-rerank candidate over field-sum top-50 retrieval.
Ran live coverage-rerank evaluation over 225 Cranfield queries: nDCG@10 0.3095.
Added opt-in PRF rerank candidate and evaluated it over 225 Cranfield queries: nDCG@10 0.3253.
Added binary relevance mode and paper-style BM25 index comparison: best local comparable NDCG@20 0.4547.
Added an evaluation timeline that links metric artifacts to generation, search evolution, architecture, decision, Git tag status, and release status.
Validated the evolution traceability repair with npm run validate.
Tested PRF-expanded retrieval and rejected it after nDCG@10 regressed to 0.3219.
Added refined PRF phrase coherence and improved nDCG@10 to 0.3260 and paper-style binary NDCG@20 to 0.4563.
Added reusable live OpenSearch retrieval-pool caching for Cranfield field-sum top-50 candidates.
Updated PRF tuning to read cached retrieval pools offline through --retrieval-cache.
Generated retrieval-pools-field-sum-top50-gen017.json for 225 Cranfield queries and reproduced refined PRF nDCG@10 0.3260 from cache.
Added offline Cranfield embedding cache generation with local-hash and OpenAI provider paths.
Added vector-only and hybrid vector-plus-field-sum evaluation over Cranfield.
Ran local-hash vector-control evaluation: vector-only nDCG@10 0.1453 and best hybrid nDCG@10 0.3054, below refined PRF nDCG@10 0.3260.
Added SE-0003, ARCH-0.3-candidate, and ADL-0003 for the vector/hybrid candidate path.
Added local Ollama embedding support with restartable checkpointing and title+abstract embedding text profiles.
Generated Ollama llama3.1:8b embeddings for 1,400 Cranfield documents and 225 queries.
Evaluated Ollama vector-only and hybrid retrieval: vector-only nDCG@10 0.0282, best hybrid nDCG@10 0.3035, and binary nDCG@20 0.4343, all below refined PRF.
Updated SE-0003, ARCH-0.3-candidate, ADL-0003, mission updates, evaluation timeline, and traceability artifacts with GEN-019 evidence.
Added offline Cranfield LTR feature extraction, coordinate-ascent training, query-grouped cross-validation, and candidate-pool oracle reporting.
Ran LTR with cached Ollama embedding features and a lexical/PRF-only ablation over cached field-sum top-50 pools.
Recorded that best cross-validated LTR improves field-sum but remains below refined PRF: graded nDCG@10 0.3166 and binary nDCG@20 0.4529.
Recorded in-sample LTR capacity evidence above refined PRF, but kept it non-promotable due to overfit risk.
Added SE-0004, ARCH-0.4-candidate, ADL-0004, LTR research notes, and GEN-020 traceability.
Added dependency-free pointwise boosted-tree LTR to the offline LTR evaluator.
Ran quick and depth-3 boosted-tree LTR experiments over cached field-sum top-50 pools.
Recorded that depth-3 boosted-tree LTR improves graded cross-validation to nDCG@10 0.3216 but remains below refined PRF 0.3260.
Recorded that boosted-tree binary cross-validation reaches nDCG@20 0.4457, below lexical LTR 0.4529 and refined PRF 0.4563.
Updated SE-0004, ARCH-0.4-candidate, ADL-0004, LTR research notes, and GEN-021 traceability.
Added Hugging Face/SentenceTransformers embedding support to the Cranfield embedding cache.
Generated BGE BAAI/bge-base-en-v1.5 embeddings for 1,400 Cranfield documents and 225 queries.
Evaluated BGE vector-only and hybrid retrieval: best hybrid graded nDCG@10 0.3533 and binary nDCG@20 0.4915, above refined PRF.
Evaluated LTR with BGE features: coordinate LTR nDCG@10 0.3541 and boosted-tree LTR nDCG@10 0.3603 under query-grouped cross-validation.
Updated SE-0003, SE-0004, ARCH-0.3-candidate, ARCH-0.4-candidate, ADL-0003, ADL-0004, mission updates, evaluation timeline, and GEN-022 traceability.
Added remote OpenSearch BGE candidate index loading and vector/hybrid evaluation scripts.
Created and loaded cranfield-v0-bge-base-en-v15-gen023 with 1,400 Cranfield documents and 768-dimensional BGE vectors.
Evaluated remote OpenSearch BGE vector-only and hybrid retrieval: best hybrid graded nDCG@10 0.3533 and binary nDCG@20 0.4926, above refined PRF.
Updated SE-0003, ARCH-0.3-candidate, ADL-0003, mission updates, evaluation timeline, and GEN-023 traceability.
Added stable milestone search and explain endpoints for ARCH-0.1 baseline and ARCH-0.2 refined PRF candidate.
Added explicit candidate-runtime-limited ARCH-0.3 BGE milestone search and explain endpoints returning 501 until live query-vector generation or bounded known-query embeddings are implemented.
Documented milestone endpoints and added traceability validation for the new endpoint contract.
Deployed Cloudflare Worker version 3e9597b9-f791-457f-805f-f1dbb8123a3c with public /api/v0.1 and milestone endpoint routes.
Verified public milestone endpoints: ARCH-0.1 and ARCH-0.2-prf return live Cranfield responses, and ARCH-0.3-bge returns the intended 501 runtime limitation.
next: Validate transferability before promoting remote BGE hybrid beyond Cranfield.

Compare the simpler remote BGE hybrid path against BGE-feature LTR before accepting LTR complexity.
